title: draba verna var. campestris
intro: Draba verna var. campestris, a variant of the early spring mustard plant, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of glucosinolates and other bioactive compounds. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as its use as an antiseptic and expectorant. Herbal preparations of Draba verna var. campestris, including tinctures and infusions, are typically used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
